headline: Senator Seeks 2024 Ban on Elected Officials' Memecoins

article.title: US senator calls for ban on elected officials issuing memecoins

headline: Canada, Philippines to Ink $2B Trade Pact

article.summary: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.
